## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. What's the change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking fix)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking addition)
- [ ] New starter template
- [ ] New guided lesson
- [ ] UI / theme / accessibility improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Breaking change (something that would affect existing users)

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested `ide.html` in **Chrome**
- [ ] I tested `ide.html` in **Edge**
- [ ] Mobile layout still works (narrow the browser window to check)
- [ ] New starter templates have **beginner-friendly plain-English comments**
- [ ] I did **not** add any build tools, bundlers, or npm packages
- [ ] I did **not** commit any API keys, WiFi passwords, or personal info
- [ ] I did **not** reference Arduino IDE, PlatformIO, or external IDEs in user-facing text
